note: The 14 GB-regulated major allergens (retained Food Information Regulations 2014 / assimilated Regulation (EU) 1169/2011). Verified against current FSA allergen guidance on 2026-06-30; wording must be re-verified against live FSA guidance before publish (research Assumption A2). British-English spellings (soya, sulphur). Stable ids are the enum source the product schema (plan 01-04) is kept in sync with; a 15th or mistyped allergen must fail the product schema enum.
